title: İmaginary Fear Mod
description:
In a world where you are alone, abnormal events begin to happen.
The world changes and new dimensions and new worlds are formed.
Try to obtain special items from these worlds and escape from the scary creatures.


You too join this adventure!!
body:
In a world where you are alone, abnormal events begin to happen.
The world changes and new dimensions and new worlds are formed.
Try to obtain special items from these worlds and escape from the scary creatures.

New versions will continue to arrive once the mod's refinement process is completed.
